implementation_hashes.audit: IMPLEMENTED: Registry state unchanged (already IMPLEMENTED). Product surface completed on top: Tauri v2 desktop wallet at wallet/app (standalone cargo project noos-wallet-app at wallet/app/src-tauri, deliberately outside the crates/* workspace glob). Derivation goes through the noos-wallet core via Tauri commands; Rust tests prove command-layer parity with all 30 frozen protocol/vectors/wallet/derivation-v1.json cases (public_id == BLAKE3(vector secret)) plus falsifiers (non-hardenable indices, purpose/suite forgeries, cross-purpose non-collapse). JS core reproduces every vector secret via HKDF-SHA256 (node --test). Address display: strict Bech32m per identity-v1 s2 (lowercase-only, strict noos HRP, checksum, historical-HRP wrong_protocol_identity) validated against protocol/api/vectors positive+negative; payload stays opaque because the layout is OWNER_BLOCKED (identity-v1 s2.1) - no default layout was invented. Tx build+sign: identity-gated note selection, fee plan, construction, Ed25519 signing with independent verify_strict recomputation and flipped-byte falsifier. Update manifests: detached Ed25519 over canonical NOOS/WALLET/UPDATE/V1 bytes, bound to app id, chain identity, platform, arch, AND subscribed channel (a correctly signed other-channel manifest is a wrong target); falsifiers cover tampered artifact hash, attacker-key resign, cross-target replay, structural forgeries, malformed updater keys, in both Rust and JS. PACKAGING STATUS (honest): tauri crates fetched and compiled successfully; cargo build --features gui produced noos-wallet-app.exe, which boots and stays up serving the built UI (6s boot smoke, then killed). cargo test 9/9 with and without --features gui; clippy -D warnings clean; fmt clean. UI built npm-free via node:module stripTypeScriptTypes (wallet/app/build.mjs). NOT done: installer/bundle artifacts (bundle.active=false; no signing key exists), no interactive human GUI walkthrough, and wallet addresses are never emitted for own keys (OWNER_BLOCKED). JS suite: node --test "wallet/**/*.test.mjs" 13/13 green; note node 24.15.0 on Windows mishandles a bare directory arg (node --test wallet execs the directory) - pre-existing runner defect, glob form covers the same files. [WalletApp]
